seo.title: Chicken soup - for a quick meal - Marinda Kook

html:
I woke up this morning craving chicken soup. The soup is very healthy and can also work as a detox. I make a whole pot of soup and it easily keeps for 2 to 3 days in our house.

NEEDED:

  • 3 garlic cloves
  • 1 onion
  • ginger (about the size of your thumb)
  • 60 ml oil
  • 30 ml chilli flakes, or as strong as you like it
  • lemongrass
  • 1 chicken
  • 3 chicken stock cubes
  • 1.5 litres boiling water

You can add any vegetables of your choice to the pot.

Be careful with salt and pepper. The chicken stock is very salty. Taste first.

 

NOW:

  1. finely chop the onion, garlic and ginger and fry together with the chilli flakes in the oil
  2. fry the chicken together with the onion mixture until brown
  3. mix the chicken stock with the warm water and pour over the chicken
  4. bruise the lemongrass and add it to the pot too (you can now add vegetables of your choice here)
  5. cook for 1 hour
  6. debone the chicken and shred it. Discard the skin and bones and put the shredded chicken back into the broth.
  7. a quick, delicious soup

I served my soup with coriander. There's something comforting about chicken soup.
